Welcome to SpiritPool

SpiritPool collects job listing data from sites you browse to help build staffing intelligence.

What we collect

  • Job title, company, location, salary range
  • Posting date, applicant count, urgency badges
  • Store ratings & review counts (Google Maps)

What we never collect

  • Passwords, cookies, or session tokens
  • Your browsing history beyond allowed job sites
  • Personal information (name, email, resume)

Allowed sites

  • indeed.com
  • linkedin.com/jobs
  • glassdoor.com
  • google.com/maps
  • apply.starbucks.com

🌊 SpiritPool
